seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Combining Opus 4.7, GPT 5.5 Thinking, and Gemini 3.2 into an agent swarm enables building full-stack custom software products, potentially replacing CRMs and SaaS with tailored organizational tools.
New 0.6 release of deepagents includes lots of good improvements, with a detailed write-up highlighting practical enhancements for agent frameworks.
